# BP-161 negative: a test opens a local database target.
lang: go
file: BP-161-safe_test.go
variant: local-sql-dsn
---
package dbtest

import (
	"database/sql"
	"testing"
)

func TestDatabase(t *testing.T) {
	db, err := sql.Open("postgres", "postgres://app:secret@localhost:5432/orders_test")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	_ = db
}
